description: Configure the SeisComP fdsnws module to serve earthquake events, station metadata, and waveform data. The module must be configured to enable the event, station, and dataselect services and listen on port 8080. Verify the service is functional by saving the following query results to ~/fdsnws_test/: earthquake events with a minimum magnitude of 5 to events.xml, station metadata for the GE network to stations.xml, and the dataselect service version to dataselect_version.txt.
